2606.10860.title: Training LLMs to Enforce Multi-Level Instruction Hierarchies via Gravity-Weighted Direct Preference Optimization
2606.10860.paper_summary: Production LLMs receive instructions from sources with very different levels of trust, yet attend to every token with uniform architectural privilege. This is the structural vulnerability that enables malicious prompt injections and, more broadly, leaves models without a principled way to resolve conflicts between legitimate but competing instructions. A common training-based response is to teach models an explicit instruction hierarchy; existing approaches, however, formalize hierarchies of only three or four levels, treat all violations as equally severe, and rarely evaluate the full set of pairwise level interactions. We formalize a k-level instruction hierarchy problem and instantiate it for k=5, yielding ten pairwise priority relations that a compliant model must enforce. We then introduce Gravity-Weighted DPO (GW-DPO), a preference-optimization objective whose per-sample offset scales with the structural distance between conflicting levels under a linear or bilateral schedule, the latter weighting severity by both the privilege gap and the privilege of the victim level. Combined with hierarchy-specific delimiter tokens (Chen et al., 2025) and Instructional Segment Embeddings (ISE; Wu et al., 2025), GW-DPO with the bilateral schedule Pareto-improves over standard DPO and the linear variant on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, raising macro pairwise priority adherence while keeping over-refusal at half the standard DPO rate. Ablations isolate ISE as a refusal-threshold calibrator and recast five- versus three-level training as a generality-specialization tradeoff.
2606.10860.paper_summary_zh: 生產 LLM 從信任程度非常不同的來源接收指令，但對每個標記都以統一的架構特權進行處理。這是導致惡意提示注入的結構性脆弱性，更廣泛地說，這使得模型在解決合法但相互競爭的指令之間的衝突時缺乏原則性的方法。一種常見的基於訓練的回應是教導模型明確的指令層級；然而，現有的方法僅形式化三或四個層級的層級結構，將所有違規行為視為同等嚴重，並且很少評估完整的成對層級互動集。我們形式化了一個 k 層指令層級問題並為 k=5 進行實例化，產生了合規模型必須強制執行的十個成對優先關係。然後，我們引入重力加權 DPO (GW-DPO)，這是一個偏好優化目標，其每個樣本的偏移量隨著在線性或雙邊時間表下衝突層級之間的結構距離而縮放，後者根據特權差距和受害層級的特權加權嚴重性。結合層級特定的分隔符標記 (Chen et al., 2025) 和指令段嵌入 (ISE; Wu et al., 2025)，在雙邊時間表下的 GW-DPO 相較於標準 DPO 和線性變體在 Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct 上進行了 Pareto 改進，提高了宏觀成對優先遵守率，同時將過度拒絕率保持在標準 DPO 率的一半。消融實驗將 ISE 隔離為拒絕閾值校準器，並將五層與三層的訓練重新表述為一般性與專門化的權衡。
2606.10860.author: Lena S. Bolliger et.al.
2606.10860.authors: Lena S. Bolliger, Lena A. Jäger
